message:
feat(core,cli,mvcc): POSIX write-path fixes, repair metrics refactor, and WAL fault-injection tests

ffs-core bug fixes:
- Add POSIX EEXIST duplicate-name guard in create() and mkdir() to
  prevent silent overwrites when a name already exists in the parent dir
- Add rename-to-self no-op short circuit (POSIX requires rename(old,old)
  to succeed without side effects)

ffs-core new tests (25+):
- Rename semantics: file-over-directory (EISDIR), directory-over-file
  (ENOTDIR), overwrite-existing-file replaces target, self-rename no-op,
  cross-directory rename
- setattr edge cases: chmod, chown, extend via size, truncate to zero,
  combined chmod+truncate
- Write edge cases: zero-byte write, block-boundary write, multi-block
  spanning write
- Symlink create/readlink roundtrip on ext4
- Unlink nlink decrement with hardlink survival
- Duplicate create and mkdir EEXIST enforcement
- fsync/fsyncdir on read-only fs returns EROFS
- Long filename (255 ok, 256 rejected) boundary
- Hardlink to nonexistent inode fails
- DegradationLevel Display/from_raw clamping, FSM debug format
- PressureMonitor budget accessor, policy apply-on-tick callback
- OpenFs MVCC wrapper methods: stage/commit/read, record_read, prune,
  SSI commit (no-conflict and conflict detection), jbd2_writer flags

ffs-cli refactor + tests:
- Extract unavailable_repair_info() helper eliminating two identical
  8-field RepairInfoOutput struct constructions for ext4/btrfs fallback
- Add CLI parse tests for inspect, mvcc-stats, dump (inode/extents/dir),
  mount (with all flags and minimal), scrub, parity, evidence (with all
  flags and minimal), mkfs (with all flags and defaults)
- Add negative parse tests: mount without mountpoint, scrub without
  image, parity with unexpected positional, evidence non-numeric tail,
  mkfs non-numeric size-mb
- Add summarize_repair_staleness tests: empty input, mixed states,
  all-fresh, all-stale, all-untracked, single entry, arbitrary group IDs
- Add unavailable_repair_info unit tests for ext4 and btrfs fallback
- Add build_info_output repair metrics fallback integration test
- Add format_ratio_thousandths tests: zero denominator, zero numerator,
  exact ratio, fractional, large values
- Add choose_btrfs_scrub_block_size tests: aligned, fallback, zero
  nodesize, non-power-of-two, unaligned image, minimum 4096 floor
- Add select_ext4_repair_groups tests: all-fresh skip, full-scrub
  override, empty staleness dirty/clean paths

ffs-mvcc WAL fault injection:
- Add #[cfg(test)] fail_sync flag to WalFile for deterministic sync
  failure injection without filesystem tricks
- Add wal_sync_failure_rolls_back_commit_state: verify in-memory state
  unchanged after WAL sync failure
- Add wal_sync_failure_rolls_back_ssi_log_and_commit_seq: verify SSI log
  cleanup and next_commit restoration on sync failure
- Add wal_sync_failure_multi_block_rollback: all staged blocks rolled
  back atomically
- Add wal_sync_failure_recovery_allows_subsequent_commit: verify store
  recovers and accepts new commits after transient failure
- Add wal_sync_failure_after_successful_commit_preserves_prior_data:
  prior committed data survives subsequent failed commit

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
